phase_details.label: Platform Contact
phase_details.comment: Single platform, pseudonymous approach

phase_details.label: Normalization & Trust

phase_details.label: Escalating Solicitation
phase_details.comment: Directed production, CSAM produced as escalation instrument not coercion endpoint

phase_details.label: Material Retained
phase_details.comment: CSAM held as record of escalation

phase_details.label: Meeting → Physical Contact
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — offense progresses to physical terminus; does not cycle

phase_details.label: Visual Profile Targeting
phase_details.comment: Instagram visual profiles + algorithmic surfacing

phase_details.label: DM Coercion
phase_details.comment: Instagram DM with disappearing messages option

phase_details.label: Migration to Production Channel
phase_details.comment: Instagram → Messenger; severs evidence trail; accesses live video capability

phase_details.label: Live Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Offender commands; victim performs; session recorded including without victim's knowledge

phase_details.label: Media Capture

phase_details.label: Archive as Ongoing Leverage
phase_details.comment: Each session adds to archive; harm persists as leverage for future sessions

phase_details.label: Persistent CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Harm does not end when contact does

phase_details.label: Impersonation Contact at Scale
phase_details.comment: 80+ Snapchat, 40+ Instagram accounts

phase_details.label: Deception & Identity Fabrication
phase_details.comment: False peer identity

phase_details.label: First Image — Asymmetry Created
phase_details.comment: CSAM obtained; victim cannot undo

phase_details.label: Threat Delivered
phase_details.comment: Threat to expose to social network

phase_details.label: Self-Sustaining Coercion Loop
phase_details.comment: Daily quotas; each compliance produces new material extending leverage; account churn after bans

phase_details.label: Network Distribution & Recruitment
phase_details.comment: Material to co-conspirators gated behind harassment; victims recruit other victims

phase_details.label: Perpetual Re-Contact
phase_details.comment: No closure; cycle ends only at apprehension or material removal

enterprise.title: ENTERPRISE
enterprise.citation: United States v. Bermudez et al. (E.D.N.Y. 1:25-cr-00361)

phase_details.label: Gaming Platform Funnel
phase_details.comment: CS:GO, Roblox; in-game chat; pseudonymous gaming identities. Enterprise role: Recruiters

phase_details.label: Enterprise Recruitment
phase_details.comment: Discord invite; role assignment; victims recruited by coerced existing victims. Enterprise role: Coordinators

phase_details.label: Parallel Grooming
phase_details.comment: Role-specialized coordinators; multiple victims simultaneously. Enterprise role: Coordinators

phase_details.label: Migration to Operational HQ

phase_details.label: Parallel Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Coordinators direct producers; producers direct victims; simultaneous across multiple victims. Enterprise role: Producers

phase_details.label: Gated Distribution
phase_details.comment: Discord servers + DMs; harassment access gates; distributed storage across members. Enterprise role: Distributors

phase_details.label: Threats, Swatting & Doxing
phase_details.comment: Role-specialized threat actors; physical safety threatened; self-harm induced. Enterprise role: Threat actors

phase_details.label: Permanent Distributed Record
phase_details.comment: No single seizure recovers all copies

phase_details.label: Grindr Contact
phase_details.comment: Victim identification via dating/hookup platform (Grindr); pseudonymous adult-minor contact

phase_details.label: Vulnerability Grooming

phase_details.label: Commercial Sexual Exploitation
phase_details.comment: Sex trafficking of minors (5 charged victims); financial inducement, transportation, drug provision alleged

phase_details.label: Multi-Victim Sustained Operation

phase_details.label: Sustained Commercial Exploitation

phase_details.label: Grindr Catfish Contact

phase_details.label: CP Group Participation
phase_details.comment: WhatsApp CP group membership; normalized exchange of child sexual abuse material

phase_details.label: Migration to Encrypted Stack

phase_details.label: Omegle → Kik → Snapchat Funnel

phase_details.label: Snapchat Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Knew victim age 12-13; insisted until explicit images produced; corroborated by device artifacts

phase_details.label: Device CP Archive
phase_details.comment: 1800+ images and 800+ videos across two Samsung devices; ongoing receipt and trading through May 2020

phase_details.label: Persistent CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — large local archive of produced and received material retained on seized Samsung devices

phase_details.label: Grindr Contact with Minors
phase_details.comment: April 2020 — defendant contacted 14-year-old boys on Grindr; commercial-sex recruitment thread opened

phase_details.label: Payment Negotiation
phase_details.comment: Financial inducement ($50–$70) for oral sex; meet logistics on Grindr before channel shift

phase_details.label: Grindr → SMS Migration

phase_details.label: Paid Commercial Sex Acts

phase_details.label: Multi-Victim Sustained Operation

phase_details.label: CSAM Archive & Sustained Exploitation
phase_details.comment: Maintenance tail — pin-protected iPhone held 1500+ hash-matched CSAM in 250+ folders until state search warrant and DCI seizure April 10

phase_details.label: Cross-Border Social Media Contact

phase_details.label: Facilitator Grooming & Payment Framing

phase_details.label: Explicit Pose & Image Solicitation

phase_details.label: Third-Party Paid Production

phase_details.label: Repeat Solicitation via Facilitator

phase_details.label: Retained CSAM on Device

phase_details.label: App → SMS Migration

phase_details.label: Explicit Text & Photo Exchange

phase_details.label: Kik Catfish Persona Contact

phase_details.label: Third-Party Coercion Funnel

phase_details.label: Kik → FaceTime Migration
phase_details.comment: Live video call attempted after Kik grooming; ephemeral channel for directed on-camera conduct

phase_details.label: Instagram Modeling Lure
phase_details.comment: MV2 discovers defendant via Instagram; modeling-agent pretext; age 16 disclosed

phase_details.label: Dual-Persona Coercion Cycle
phase_details.comment: Same defendant runs fake Kik persona and 'Joe' identity; fake payment narrative; exposure threats on MV2 path

phase_details.label: Self-Harm & Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Coerced self-harm and body-written demands; explicit images and FaceTime sessions with MV2

phase_details.label: Kik CP Receipt Archive
phase_details.comment: Hundreds of images and videos exchanged on Kik across dual-victim threads; material accumulated on defendant devices

phase_details.label: Persistent CSAM Receipt Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — interstate receipt and retention of child sexual abuse material on defendant iPhones through November 2016

phase_details.label: Dark Web Forum Registration
phase_details.comment: Website A — 100+ registered members; public-facing chatroom for CP discussion and link trading; launched ~2017

phase_details.label: Enterprise Promotion Ladder
phase_details.comment: Membership and moderator status earned by sharing CP; McIntosh voted on promotions; Katsampes elevated Nov 2022 after sustained posting

phase_details.label: Staff Training & On-Topic Coaching
phase_details.comment: Head-admin trained Katsampes on moderator shifts; coaching lower-ranking users on compliant CP sharing; McIntosh developed FAQ and backed up room data

phase_details.label: Tiered Room Migration
phase_details.comment: Public chatroom → members-only → specialized topic rooms (age/topic gated); access earned by additional CP posts

phase_details.label: Link-Based CP Distribution
phase_details.comment: Tagged link posts redirect to file-host contact sheets; tens or hundreds of thousands of images/videos circulated; Katsampes June–Oct 2022 distribution incidents

phase_details.label: Gated Repository Moderation
phase_details.comment: Moderators enforce on-topic rules, mute users, and gate interior repositories; McIntosh monitored donation email and admin voting room

phase_details.label: OPSEC & LE-Avoidance Culture
phase_details.comment: Dedicated evasion chatroom; McIntosh warned staff to treat all users as potential LE; encryption used to conceal activity

phase_details.label: Persistent Distributed Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — CP persists across file-host infrastructure and seized devices; post-Nov 2022 migration to successor dark-web sites until arrests

phase_details.label: Craig Wright Catfish Romance
phase_details.comment: Stafford used fake Facebook Messenger persona Craig Wright to lure Victim E into an online romance; KSP investigation opened after parent complaint of group chat containing victim nudes

phase_details.label: Intimate Harvesting & Contract Fiction
phase_details.comment: Through Craig Wright, Stafford obtained intimate details and visual depictions; introduced fake illegal 'company' contract fiction that victim believed bound her to comply

phase_details.label: Multi-Persona Sextortion Demands
phase_details.comment: RexRiddle Hado and Zeke Carter personas used harvested material to extort Victim E for additional explicit imagery and compliance; family-harm threats if victim refused

phase_details.label: Campbell Third-Party Coercion Funnel
phase_details.comment: Stafford ran parallel fake-persona thread grooming co-offender Campbell with phony love interest Meghan; RexRiddle Hado demanded Campbell film sex with Victim E or pay $200 gift card

phase_details.label: June 10 Garage Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Campbell traveled to Victim E's Anderson County home; victim disclosed coercion; Campbell filmed vaginal intercourse creating the June 10th video series on his phone

phase_details.label: June 10th Series Transmission
phase_details.comment: Campbell sent sexually explicit videos to RexRiddle Hado via Facebook Messenger; Stafford admits he controlled all fake personas and orchestrated production using interstate internet and out-of-state devices

phase_details.label: Multi-Device CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: KSP seized UMX, Maxwest, Motorola Moto E6, Lenovo Chromebook, and Moto E6 devices from Stafford; judgment orders forfeiture of all listed electronics

phase_details.label: Persistent Retained CSAM Collection
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — June 10th series and related depictions retained across seized devices; 360-month sentence on Count 1 production; victim harm persists in archived material

phase_details.label: Mobile App Chat Contact
phase_details.comment: February 2019: Duron in San Antonio contacted CV1 in Oregon, Wisconsin via mobile application chat rooms; interstate commerce element

phase_details.label: Grooming & Production Solicitation
phase_details.comment: Defendant knew victim was a child; coerced her to produce images and videos of sexual activity via mobile applications

phase_details.label: First CSAM Production & Receipt
phase_details.comment: Count 2 production and Count 3 receipt — depictions transmitted interstate and archived on defendant mobile devices through March 2019

phase_details.label: Threat to Disseminate
phase_details.comment: Defendant threatened to disseminate nude and erotic photographs to injure CV1's reputation and extort additional images; interstate communication

phase_details.label: Escalating Explicit Demands
phase_details.comment: Under threat to disseminate, defendant demanded additional sexually explicit images and videos via mobile applications; prior compliance and leverage made refusal psychologically costly

phase_details.label: Continued Extortion Demands
phase_details.comment: Continued mobile-app threats demanding more child pornography; Count 1 enticement and ongoing coercion through June 11, 2019

phase_details.label: Device CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Defendant saved received CSAM on iPhone and Motorola devices subject to forfeiture

phase_details.label: Persistent Retained CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — produced and received depictions retained on forfeited iPhones and Motorola devices; coercion cycle ends at arrest; victim harm persists in archived material

phase_details.label: ICAC Snapchat Cybertip Origin
phase_details.comment: WY DCI ICAC investigators received Cybertips from Snapchat (and linked Instagram accounts) identifying defendant Kyle Bradley Smith; registered sex offender with prior Sheridan County CR-2016-18 conviction

phase_details.label: MV1 Grooming & Coercion
phase_details.comment: March–April 2022: defendant persuaded, induced, enticed, and coerced Minor Victim 1 via Internet and cellular networks to engage in sexually explicit conduct

phase_details.label: MV1 Completed Production
phase_details.comment: Count 2 conviction — production through April 28, 2022; visual depictions transported and transmitted using interstate Internet and cellular telephone networks

phase_details.label: 2252A Distribution Window
phase_details.comment: February–April 2022 distribution conduct (Count 1) dismissed at plea; defendant agreed to $3,000 restitution for unpled conduct pursuant to plea agreement

phase_details.label: MV2 Re-Contact Thread
phase_details.comment: September 2022: defendant re-engaged Minor Victim 2 via interstate electronic means after MV1 production window closed

phase_details.label: MV2 Attempted Production
phase_details.comment: Count 4 conviction — attempted to persuade, induce, and entice MV2 to produce sexually explicit depictions September 10–13, 2022

phase_details.label: Multi-Device Forfeiture
phase_details.comment: Indictment forfeiture: iPhone 13 Pro Max, Motorola Moto E, iPhone 11; seized devices hold multi-victim production and receipt archive

phase_details.label: Persistent Multi-Victim CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — produced and attempted depictions retained on forfeited iPhones across MV1 and MV2 threads; coercion cycle ends at arrest; victim harm persists in archived material

phase_details.label: Online CI (Prostitute) Contact
phase_details.comment: Defendant communicated online with female prostitute — confidential informant for Jeffersontown Police

phase_details.label: Child Commercial Sex Inquiry
phase_details.comment: Asked CI about paid sex with a child; stated preferred ages 8–10 — commercial trafficking recruitment opened

phase_details.label: LE-Directed Decoy Offer
phase_details.comment: Feb 21 — CI reports to J-Town PD; at LE direction CI offers access to purported 12-year-old (undercover decoy) via text message

phase_details.label: Proof-of-Life Image Exchange
phase_details.comment: Defendant demanded photographs as proof child existed; undercover decoy images transmitted to defendant

phase_details.label: Commercial Price & Meet Terms
phase_details.comment: Feb 24 — $1,200 agreed for sex acts with purported minor; $500 cash down + $700 CashApp balance; meet location proposed

phase_details.label: Travel With Down Payment
phase_details.comment: Feb 25 ~00:00 — drove white Kia SUV to CI-designated meet carrying $500 cash withdrawn en route; trajectory toward hands-on commercial sex act if uninterrupted

phase_details.label: Meet Interdiction & Arrest
phase_details.comment: Multi-agency surveillance; SUV stopped; Earnest arrested without incident; iPhone seized (Faraday bag → USSS); chain disrupted before commercial sex act with minor
phase_details.disrupted_target: commercial sex trafficking of purported 12-year-old at agreed meet

phase_details.label: Facilitator Contact in Philippines
phase_details.comment: February 2021 — U.S. citizen living in Philippines came into contact with Facilitator who sold access to minor males for CSAM, livestream, and in-person sexual acts (plea agreement ¶3(a))

phase_details.label: Paid CSAM Access & Financial Grooming
phase_details.comment: July 27, 2021 onward — encrypted messaging and Google Drive links; money for explicit images and videos; selection of underage boys; pizza money and essentials exchanged before in-person encounters (plea ¶3(a)-(b); sentencing memorandum)

phase_details.label: Commissioned Remote Production
phase_details.comment: July–November 2021 — defendant paid for minor boys to engage in sexually explicit conduct; videos and images uploaded to password-protected Google Drive and sent via encrypted messaging; livestreamed conduct (plea ¶3(b))

phase_details.label: In-Person Hands-On Abuse
phase_details.comment: Late August–September 2021 — four hotel encounters plus pool-house party; defendant engaged in sexual acts with minors including oral sex; narrated encounters while Facilitator staged additional boys (plea ¶3(a); sentencing memorandum)

phase_details.label: Transport & Continued Solicitation
phase_details.comment: November 2021 — defendant transported depictions to United States on cell phone; continued paying for CSAM while traveling and after return to Walton, Kentucky (plea ¶3(c); sentencing memorandum Dec 2021 thread)

phase_details.label: Persistent Transnational CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — commissioned and in-person-produced depictions retained on devices carried to Eastern District of Kentucky; harm persists for multiple unidentified minor victims

svicac_2022_009.title: Garcia
svicac_2022_009.citation: United States v. Garcia-De Leon (N.D. Cal. 4:21-cr-00052)

phase_details.label: Kik CSAM Group Administration Onset
phase_details.comment: May 7, 2020 — defendants Garcia-De Leon and Darabi operated and administered a private Kik chat group through which members shared CSAM (indictment ¶6)

phase_details.label: Gateway DM CSAM Verification
phase_details.comment: Defendants administered a separate gateway group requiring prospective members to send CSAM videos via Kik direct message before Hogwarts admission — builds verified member pool (indictment ¶7)

phase_details.label: Gateway → Hogwarts Room Migration
phase_details.comment: Defendants discussed and launched the Hogwarts child pornography room after gateway verification — children's popular-culture group name (indictment ¶8; sentencing memorandum)

phase_details.label: Hogwarts Governed CSAM Exchange
phase_details.comment: May 8–20, 2020 — at least 10 Kik users plus defendants actively distributed CSAM in Hogwarts at defendants' encouragement; 24-hour posting rules and under-ten content requirements; defendants posted and commented (sentencing memorandum; indictment ¶¶9–11)

phase_details.label: Multi-Room Continued Administration
phase_details.comment: Through August 2020 search — defendant still administered Hogwarts plus 6–8 other Kik CSAM chatrooms; 600+ images on phone including 219 identified images and 3 videos from 89 victim series (sentencing memorandum)

phase_details.label: Persistent Distributed CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — gateway-verified Hogwarts circulation and multi-room administration sustain harm across 89 identified victim series and group member archives (sentencing memorandum)

ncmec_2023_224.title: Daniels
ncmec_2023_224.citation: United States v. Daniels (S.D. W. Va. 2:23-cr-00023)

phase_details.label: Kik Contact with Minor Victim 1
phase_details.comment: June 2021 — defendant began communicating with 13-year-old girl on Kik using interstate cellular networks and internet (guilty plea admission; superseding indictment Count 1 anchors attempted enticement on or about June 21, 2022)

phase_details.label: False-Age Grooming & Sexual Normalization
phase_details.comment: Defendant pretended to be 17 years old; sent pornographic images; explained sexual intercourse before asking victim to undress — identity misrepresentation and computer-facilitated grooming (guilty plea; USSG §2G1.3(b)(2) enhancement in sentencing memorandum)

phase_details.label: Video-Call Enticement & Production Attempt
phase_details.comment: June 21, 2022 — defendant attempted to persuade, induce, entice, and coerce Minor Victim 1 to engage in sexual activity and sexually explicit conduct for visual depiction; initiated video calls attempting sexual conduct (superseding indictment Counts 1–2; guilty plea)

phase_details.label: Parallel Believed-Minor Solicitation
phase_details.comment: Defendant engaged in sexual online conversations with multiple individuals he believed were children while posing as a 17-year-old and soliciting sexually explicit images (guilty plea admission)

phase_details.label: Phone & Kik CSAM Collection
phase_details.comment: August 1, 2022 — defendant possessed 22 images and 297 videos depicting minors engaging in sexually explicit conduct on cellular phone and Kik account (superseding indictment Count 3; guilty plea admission)

phase_details.label: Persistent CSAM Archive Harm
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — device- and Kik-retained depictions continue to victimize children exploited in production; internet circulation sustains harm beyond defendant's possession (sentencing memorandum)

phase_details.label: Multi-Persona Snapchat Onset
phase_details.comment: Sept 14, 2021 — defendant contacted 12-year-old Jane Doe 1 on Snapchat username zanesmjth; nine NCMEC CyberTips tied to multiple linked Snapchat handles Aug–Nov 2021 (statement of facts ¶¶1, 16)

phase_details.label: Instructional Grooming & Covert Recording
phase_details.comment: Defendant instructed victims how to make videos, asked to keep depictions; Mobizen and recording software retained Snapchat interactions unbeknownst to victims (statement of facts ¶¶14-15)

phase_details.label: Jane Doe 1 Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Sept 14, 2021 — after Jane Doe 1 disclosed age 12, defendant instructed sexually explicit conduct; ten-second production video sent on zanesmjth (statement of facts ¶16; Count 1)

phase_details.label: Parallel Victim Production Threads
phase_details.comment: Sept 15, 2021 Jane Doe 5 image production; Oct 24, 2021 Jane Doe 6 compilation; Nov 27, 2021 Jane Doe 6/7 asleep exploitation; March 13, 2022 Jane Doe 8/9 including toddler-directed conduct (statement of facts ¶¶17-25)

phase_details.label: Compilation & Mobizen Archive
phase_details.comment: Defendant created multi-minute compilation videos from Jane Doe 6 threads; Mobizen recordings of Jane Doe 8 interactions stored on twelve seized devices (statement of facts ¶¶20-25)

phase_details.label: Persistent Multi-Victim Production Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — covert recordings and defendant-edited compilations sustain harm across six Jane Doe victims (statement of facts; judgment 360 months)

phase_details.label: darkshadowedday Snapchat Onset
phase_details.comment: April 6, 2021 — defendant contacted believed-minor Snapchat user via darkshadowedday account, soliciting explicit images (statement of facts ¶10; Jane Doe 2)

phase_details.label: darkshadowedday CSAM Trade & Minor Solicitation
phase_details.comment: On Snapchat account darkshadowedday defendant distributed and received CSAM and solicited nude photographs from users he believed were minors (statement of facts ¶9). He later opened a second account, outcast_misfit, which he used to message Jane Doe 1 and obtain depictions (¶¶16-17) — account rotation, not a separate platform.

phase_details.label: Jane Doe 1 Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Sept 27, 2021 — defendant solicited explicit conduct from 13-year-old Jane Doe 1 on outcast_misfit; she sent a self-produced video at his direction (statement of facts ¶¶20-21; indictment Count 1)

phase_details.label: Continued Snapchat Enticement
phase_details.comment: Sept 27–Oct 7, 2021 — sustained solicitations for fingering, nudity, and sexual contact with Jane Doe 1 via outcast_misfit (statement of facts ¶¶20, 23; plea Count 2)

phase_details.label: Snapchat / Dropbox / Wickr / Kik Archive
phase_details.comment: 70 images and 23 videos on phone; 62 Snapchat files; 118 Dropbox files in age-sorted folders; Wickr and Kik CSAM exchange (statement of facts ¶¶12-13, 19)

phase_details.label: Persistent Multi-Platform CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — device- and cloud-retained depictions including Jane Doe 1 production video harm identified victims (statement of facts; 300-month sentence)

phase_details.label: Banks Network & Minor Victim Onset
phase_details.comment: September or October 2018 — Grant met J.S. through co-conspirator Banks; J.S. disclosed her age; K.C. introduced October or November 2018 and Grant learned her age (indictment ¶3-4; findings)

phase_details.label: Harboring & Co-Pimping Control
phase_details.comment: Grant and Banks harbored homeless and transient minors at Banks' Anchorage apartment, provided maintenance, and recruited them toward commercial sex through romance manipulation and co-pimping control (indictment ¶14-15; findings Count 1)

phase_details.label: Phone/Text → Adultlook.com Listings
phase_details.comment: Grant and Banks assisted K.C. with an Adultlook.com prostitution profile under moniker Lady Silky; interstate commercial sex advertisements posted from mobile devices (indictment ¶7-8, 28)

phase_details.label: Adultlook Commercial Sex Operation
phase_details.comment: Mid-October through December 2018 — Adultlook ads and phone/text customer booking; in-calls, out-calls, and car dates in Anchorage; Grant transported J.S., collected proceeds, and coordinated minor-status customer extortion (indictment ¶16-23, 27-29; findings Counts 2-5)

phase_details.label: Multi-Victim HU$H Enterprise
phase_details.comment: Sustained trafficking of J.S. and K.C. through December 2018; at least three sexually explicit videos involving J.S. branded with HU$H logo; firearms and drugs used to control victims (indictment ¶32, 409-410; findings Counts 6-8)

phase_details.label: Minor Victim Trafficking Harm
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — persistent commercial sexual exploitation of identified minor victims until December 18, 2018 arrest; guilty all trafficking counts (findings verdict)

phase_details.label: Snapchat Contact with Minor Victim 1
phase_details.comment: 2018 — after supervised release Moore began sexual encounters with 15-year-old V.P. documented on V.P.'s Snapchat account; earliest series dated May 2, 2018 (government trial brief)

phase_details.comment: March 2019 — Moore invited V.P. to move into Mayfair Drive apartment when girlfriend Krista Callan moved out, only if she commercial-sex worked for him; set rent-correlated quota (government trial brief)

phase_details.label: Snapchat → SkipTheGames.com Ads
phase_details.comment: Moore posted V.P.'s online prostitution advertisements on SkipTheGames.com with photos from his residence; ads tied to Moore's phone number and neighbor WiFi (government trial brief; parties' interstate-commerce stipulation)

phase_details.label: Commercial Sex Trafficking Operation
phase_details.comment: Moore set prices, arranged and drove dates, took proceeds; gave meth when V.P. was too tired; forced Spenard street prostitution in high heels; assaulted V.P. and forced abortion while she was 15 (government trial brief; indictment Count 3)

phase_details.label: Snapchat-Documented Enterprise
phase_details.comment: Sustained Snapchat encounter documentation on V.P.'s account and Moore's jayinglez80 account through June 2019; price notebook and commercial supplies found at Mayfair Drive search (government trial brief; judgment counts 1–2)

phase_details.label: Minor Victim Trafficking Harm
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — commercial sexual exploitation of 15-year-old V.P. until June 7, 2019 arrests; 240-month concurrent sentence (judgment Doc 251)

phase_details.label: Text & Email Contact with Minor 1
phase_details.comment: July 2023 — defendant began communicating with 12-year-old Minor 1 in Eastern District of Virginia via text and email (statement of facts ¶1)

phase_details.label: Authority Grooming & Obedience Framing
phase_details.comment: July through September 24, 2023 — sexualized commands and compliance praise establishing defendant authority over Minor 1 in interstate text and email (statement of facts ¶1–¶2)

phase_details.label: Directed Recording Solicitation
phase_details.comment: September 25, 2023 — defendant ordered Minor 1 to undress, perform sexually explicit conduct, and record it; first compliance and apparent file transfer in message thread (statement of facts ¶2; charged attempted production Count 1 dismissed at plea)

phase_details.label: Active Enticement Through First Compliance
phase_details.comment: September 25, 2023 — defendant knowingly induced and enticed Minor 1 to engage in sexual activity via sexualized commands, obedience demands, directed recording, and post-compliance validation (statement of facts ¶1–¶2; Virginia Code § 18.2-370 predicate)

phase_details.label: Post-Compliance Enticement Thread
phase_details.comment: Late September through October 30, 2023 — continued interstate text and email inducement after Sept 25 compliance gate; sustains authority-based enticement through charged conduct window (statement of facts ¶1; indictment Count 2)

phase_details.label: Live Minor Enticement Harm
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — coerced sexual conduct solicitations and recording demands caused harm to the identified 12-year-old minor (statement of facts; 120-month sentence)

phase_details.label: Subject Website Membership
phase_details.comment: July 2023 — defendant joined Subject Website dark-web forum with many thousands of registered members and topic subforums devoted to child pornography (plea agreement factual basis ¶29(a))

phase_details.label: CP Contribution Promotion Ladder
phase_details.comment: July 2023 through September 2024 — defendant made 500+ posts with download links and preview images to establish and maintain site status; staff chosen based on CP contributions (plea agreement ¶29(a)-(b))

phase_details.label: Moderator Staff Operations
phase_details.comment: Defendant served as one of ~20 staff moderators policing user posts for compliance with Subject Website rules requiring under-18 depictions and link-plus-preview format (plea agreement ¶29(a),(d))

phase_details.label: Contributor → Moderator Staff Migration
phase_details.comment: High-volume CP posting elevated defendant into moderator staff channel with rule-enforcement authority over other users (plea agreement ¶29(b),(d))

phase_details.label: Link-and-Preview CP Advertising
phase_details.comment: September 2023, January 2024, and June 2024 example posts knowingly published notices and advertisements offering to distribute child pornography via interstate internet links and preview images (plea agreement ¶29(b)-(c); Count 1)

phase_details.label: Sustained Moderator Enforcement
phase_details.comment: Through September 2024 — defendant continued moderator duties and CP posting, including noting posting limits imposed by staff responsibilities (plea agreement ¶29(d))

phase_details.label: Distributed Subject Website Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — February 2025 FBI search in Lee County, Alabama seized thousands of CSAM images and videos; Subject Website distributed copies persist beyond single-device seizure (plea agreement ¶29(e); 292-month sentence)

phase_details.label: Online Dating App Contact
phase_details.comment: 2019 — defendant connected with 14-year-old Minor 2 through online dating application (sentencing memorandum PSR ¶29; plea stipulated exploitation Section B)

phase_details.label: Jeff Persona & Persistent Solicitation
phase_details.comment: Defendant posed as Jeff/jeffg2007; voice and video calls on Application A; daily explicit photo requests even when Minor 2 at school (sentencing memorandum PSR ¶¶29, Section B)

phase_details.label: Minor 1 Five-Day Enticement
phase_details.comment: Nov 7–12, 2021 — defendant misrepresented age as 22 to 12-year-old Minor 1 on Application A; graphic sexual chat, solicited genital image and mutual masturbation (superseding indictment Count 1; sentencing memorandum Section A)

phase_details.label: Minor 2 Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Feb 2022 — at defendant request Minor 2 created sexually explicit masturbation video sent via Application A; defendant screen-recorded to iPhone 12 mini (sentencing memorandum Section B; plea §5 stipulation)

phase_details.label: Decade Collection & Application B Trading
phase_details.comment: ~600 CSAM files on laptops including encrypted zip; Application B group trading Aug 2021–Feb 2022; defendant reached Minor 2 again morning of May 18, 2022 search (sentencing memorandum Sections C–D)

phase_details.label: Persistent Screen-Recorded Production Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — screen-recorded Minor 2 production and decade encrypted collection sustain harm to depicted minors (sentencing memorandum; plea forfeiture)

phase_details.label: Facebook Contact with Victim 1
phase_details.comment: October 2021 — defendant messaged Victim 1, age 16, in Dominican Republic via Facebook using interstate and foreign commerce (stipulation of facts)

phase_details.label: Paid Commissioning & Scripted Requests
phase_details.comment: Defendant enticed Victim 1 to perform sexual acts on camera in exchange for money; sent money-transfer ID numbers and negotiated video specifications before depictions were transmitted (stipulation of facts)

phase_details.label: Victim 1 Directed Production
phase_details.comment: November 26, 2021 — Victim 1 sent 15-second self-produced video at defendant direction via Facebook (stipulation of facts; indictment Count 1)

phase_details.label: Continued Paid Video Solicitation
phase_details.comment: October–November 2021 — defendant continued scripted video requests and payment negotiations with Victim 1 on Facebook (stipulation of facts; charged conduct window through April 2022 in indictment Count 6)

phase_details.label: Laptop CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: January 9, 2024 — forensic review of seized devices found CSAM including prepubescent depictions in work-folder archive on interstate-shipped laptop (stipulation of facts; indictment Count 7)

phase_details.label: Persistent Commissioned & Possessed Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — Facebook-commissioned Victim 1 production and device-retained CSAM sustain harm to depicted minors (stipulation of facts; 330-month sentence)

phase_details.label: Embassy Residence Trust Access
phase_details.comment: Mara gained access to MV1 and MV2 through prior U.S. envoy Nancy Flores' established relationship — victims had received food and safety at government Residence 640, Ouagadougou (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶9)

phase_details.label: Poverty & Maternal-Illness Dependency Grooming
phase_details.comment: Mara mirrored prior envoy support to create dependence on Residence 640, then leveraged victims' mother's life-threatening illness to demand sex before providing help (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶¶10-12)

phase_details.label: Second-Contact Physical Escalation
phase_details.comment: Mara groped victims' breasts on second contact and escalated to pinning and violent assaults when his wife was away at work (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶¶10, 26-29)

phase_details.label: Repeated Residence 640 Assaults
phase_details.comment: Many months of repeated violent aggravated sexual abuse of MV1 and MV2 inside gated U.S. government residence — judgment counts 1, 2, 4, 6 (Feb–Oct 2023 offense dates)

phase_details.label: WhatsApp Subservience & Device Control
phase_details.comment: Mara provided phones and social accounts but retained passwords; sent subservience demands on WhatsApp including image solicitations — count 3 §2422(b) offense date Dec 12, 2023; obstruction when investigated (PSR ¶¶16-22; Gov't Trial Ex. 107; count 7)

phase_details.label: Extraterritorial Minor Victim Harm
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — embassy power asymmetry sustained hands-on abuse of two impoverished minor victims until U.S. investigation; life imprisonment (judgment Doc 157)

phase_details.label: Website A Administrator Onset
phase_details.comment: January 2021 — defendant became administrator of Website A, a dark-web site dedicated to advertisement and distribution of child sexual abuse material; 500+ posts including indictment counts 1–3 conduct (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶¶7-8)

phase_details.label: Parallel Site Rank Acquisition
phase_details.comment: 2022 — defendant acquired administrator rank on Website B (570+ posts) and global moderator status on Websites C and D while maintaining Website A operations (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶¶9-11)

phase_details.label: Cross-Site Staff Authority
phase_details.comment: Defendant held managerial or supervisory status across four dedicated CSAM websites, contributing 2,600+ combined posts to sustain enterprise hierarchy (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶6)

phase_details.label: Single-Site → Four-Site Operations
phase_details.comment: Website A administrator role expanded into parallel administration and global moderation across Websites B, C, and D; operations accessed via Sacramento Starbucks public WiFi while homeless (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶¶6-11)

phase_details.label: Cross-Site CP Distribution
phase_details.comment: September–November 2022 — defendant distributed child sexual abuse material on Websites A–D tied to indictment counts 1–7, including prepubescent victim depictions (sentencing memorandum; amended judgment)

phase_details.label: Multi-Site Global Moderation
phase_details.comment: Through November 2022 arrest — defendant continued global moderator contributions on Websites C and D (1,200+ and 400+ posts) sustaining four-site enterprise operations (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶¶10-11)

phase_details.label: Persistent Four-Site Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — November 2022 arrest at Sacramento Starbucks; eight-count conviction; distributed CSAM persists across four dark-web enterprises beyond single operator seizure (amended judgment; 292-month sentence)

phase_details.label: First Kik Distribution Thread
phase_details.comment: Nov 26, 2024 — defendant began knowingly distributing child pornography via Kik account noneya5217_0am using interstate internet and cellular networks (superseding indictment Count 5; earliest charged conduct window)

phase_details.label: Kik CSAM Receipt & Pre-Scale Distribution
phase_details.comment: Nov 26–Dec 18, 2024 — superseding indictment Count 5 conduct on noneya5217_0am precedes Count 4 second-handle distribution beginning Dec 19; Dec 31, 2024 Count 6 defendant knowingly received child pornography via noneya66_lpk — accumulating material on Kik before Jan 7–Feb 2 proliferation of accounts noneya0502_bbf, noneyal307_bql, noneya3076_sm2

phase_details.label: Multi-Account Interstate Distribution
phase_details.comment: Dec 19, 2024–Feb 14, 2025 — defendant scaled to five Kik handles and sustained parallel interstate distribution through all accounts charged in superseding indictment Counts 1–5

phase_details.label: Novel Image & AI-Morphed CSAM
phase_details.comment: Court-documented forensic accountability — distribution of a new child pornography image and receipt of artificial-intelligence-morphed child pornography depictions within the distribution archive

phase_details.label: Device-Resident CSAM Collection
phase_details.comment: Defendant maintained 175 videos and 69 images accountable on Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra — collection sustained across Kik distribution threads through conduct end Feb 14, 2025

phase_details.label: Persistent Multi-Account CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — circulated and device-retained CSAM across five Kik personas harms depicted minors (CV1 series; CV2)

phase_details.label: Multi-Persona Snapchat Contact
phase_details.comment: June 2017 through March 2019 — defendant contacted minor boys using fake teenage girl personas across Snapchat and Snap Hat accounts including sarah.shayl, mikala-shaw, emilyhunter.l6, mattyc.1234, and lastchaneb4-911 (indictment Counts 1–5)

phase_details.label: Teenage Girl Catfish Grooming
phase_details.comment: Defendant pretended to be a teenage girl and persuaded boys to send nude photographs, building leverage for later coercion (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶¶10–12)

phase_details.label: First CSAM Production & Leverage
phase_details.comment: Initial sexually explicit depictions produced and transmitted interstate via Snapchat personas; asymmetry created before exposure threats escalated (indictment Counts 1–5; judgment)

phase_details.label: Threat to Expose
phase_details.comment: Defendant threatened to expose victims to friends, family, school, and police; backed threats by sending victims pictures of themselves or other minors (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶¶18–21)

phase_details.label: Escalating Degradation Demands
phase_details.comment: Under exposure leverage, defendant demanded additional explicit imagery and commanded humiliation, self-harm, and degrading conduct from victims (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶¶18–19, 21)

phase_details.label: Serial Extortion & Account Takeover
phase_details.comment: Continued coercion for more imagery; defendant extorted access to victims' Snapchat accounts to contact additional minors; distributed depictions to at least one third-party user (sentencing memorandum; PSR ¶¶18, 21)

phase_details.label: Multi-Device CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Laptops, iPads, and iPhone subject to § 2253 forfeiture sustained retained depictions across 15+ identified victims and hundreds of additional contacts (indictment forfeiture allegation; sentencing memorandum)

phase_details.label: Serial Multi-Victim Harm
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — investigation exposed only after Minor A came forward; Boy Scout leader trust breach; 396-month sentence on five production counts (judgment Doc 58)

racketeering.title: Lam
racketeering.citation: United States v. Lam et al. (D.D.C. 1:24-cr-00417)

phase_details.label: Online Gaming Community Formation
phase_details.comment: By October 2023 — Social Engineering Enterprise members formed friendships through online gaming platforms; Texas cohabitation and cyberfraud planning (second superseding indictment ¶¶23–24, 37a)

phase_details.label: Scheme Conditioning & Database Targeting
phase_details.comment: October–December 2023 — database theft, email intrusions, and social-engineering attack combinations discussed and initiated; stolen crypto-related databases shared as targs (¶¶25, 33a, 37a–c)

phase_details.label: Role Specialization
phase_details.comment: Early 2024 onward — differentiated enterprise roles: database hackers, organizers/target identifiers, callers/social engineers, money launderers, and IRL residential burglars for hardware wallets (¶¶25–32)

phase_details.label: Social Engineering Thefts & IRL Break-ins
phase_details.comment: March–September 2024 — fraudulent VCE/email support calls, seed-phrase harvesting, and coordinated thefts including Victim-6 (~$14M) and Victim-7 (~$245M); July 2024 New Mexico hardware-wallet break-in (overt acts; forfeiture allegation)

phase_details.label: Laundering, Luxury Spending & OpSec
phase_details.comment: 2024–2025 — XMR/USDT laundering, crypto-to-cash exchangers, mansion rentals (LA/Miami/Hamptons), exotic-car fleet, straw owners; post–Sept 18 2024 Lam arrest Tangeman directed evidence destruction (¶¶33g–l; Tangeman sentencing memorandum)

phase_details.label: Prosecution & Partial Resolutions
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — Sept 2024 arrests; multi-defendant superseding indictments; partial guilty pleas to RICO conspiracy (e.g., Mehta 11/17/2025, Tangeman 12/8/2025, Yarally 1/8/2026); Lam pre-trial

elder_fraud.title: Keel
elder_fraud.citation: United States v. Keel et al. (E.D. La. 2:22-cr-00115)

phase_details.label: Initial Victim Contact
phase_details.comment: Initial outreach to elder victims in furtherance of charged false-personation and wire-fraud conduct.

phase_details.label: Authority Impersonation Conditioning
phase_details.comment: Victims are conditioned through authority-claim narratives consistent with 18 U.S.C. 912 and charged conspiracy conduct.

phase_details.label: Financial Extraction
phase_details.comment: Scheme execution through fraud-based value transfer behavior linked to conspiracy to commit wire fraud (18 U.S.C. 1349).

phase_details.label: Sustained Scheme Operation
phase_details.comment: Continued operation and victim targeting prior to adjudication in federal court.

phase_details.label: Conviction and Sentencing
phase_details.comment: Judgment reflects guilty plea and sentence for charged counts in case 2:22-cr-00115-ILRL-KWR.
